shots.prompt: POV: a hand picks up the product from a clean desk and holds it up to the camera
POV: the hand slowly rotates the product to show it from different angles, soft studio light
POV: the hand brings the product closer for a detailed close-up, shallow depth of field

vo_text: Wajib punya! Produk ini bikin hidup lo lebih gampang. Kualitas oke, harga murah banget! Klik link sekarang, stok terbatas!
